title: 100 Pcs Wooden Craft Shapes,Wooden Animal Plants,Wood Shape Squirrel Mushrooms Leaves Hedgehog Slices Embellishments, Embellishments,for Kids DIY Handmade Accessories
features: 100 Pcs Wooden Craft Shapes: This set includes 100 wooden embellishments featuring an assortment of animals and plants, such as squirrels, mushrooms, leaves, and hedgehogs. Perfect for a wide variety of DIY craft projects, from scrapbooking to home decor.

Enhances Creativity & Motor Skills: These wooden shapes are ideal for children’s crafting, helping to improve fine motor skills and hand-eye coordination. Encourage creativity and imaginative play as kids paint, decorate, and customize each piece for unique creations.

High-Quality & Safe Material: Made from premium natural wood, these craft shapes are smooth to the touch and free of splinters, ensuring safe use for kids and adults. The durable, sturdy wood makes them easy to work with and perfect for long-lasting projects.

Perfect for DIY Projects: Whether you’re creating greeting cards, scrapbooks, or nature-themed crafts, these wooden embellishments add a rustic, charming touch to any project. They are also great for seasonal decorations, party favors, and homemade gifts.

Great Gift for Crafters & Kids: Ideal for crafting parties, classrooms, or family DIY activities, this set makes a thoughtful gift for kids and crafting enthusiasts. With 100 pieces to choose from, there are endless possibilities for imaginative and hands-on fun.
description: The 100 Pcs Wooden Craft Shapes set is a delightful collection of wooden embellishments, perfect for sparking creativity in kids and adults alike. This set includes an assortment of animal and plant shapes such as squirrels, mushrooms, leaves, and hedgehogs, each carefully cut from high-quality wood. Whether you’re creating DIY projects, scrapbooking, or crafting personalized gifts, these wooden shapes provide endless opportunities for artistic expression. Ideal for children’s craft projects, this set helps enhance fine motor skills, hand-eye coordination, and creativity. The natural wood texture makes it easy to paint, decorate, or stain, allowing for complete customization. These wooden embellishments can be used in a variety of projects, from greeting cards to home decor, offering a fun way to engage children in hands-on activities. Perfect for DIY lovers and crafting enthusiasts, the 100 wooden pieces offer versatility for a wide range of creative endeavors. Whether you’re decorating for seasonal events, creating a nature-themed art project, or simply adding a rustic touch to your next craft, these wooden shapes will bring a unique charm to any creation. Their small size makes them easy to work with, and their smooth edges ensure safety during use. This set of wooden embellishments is a fantastic gift for kids, crafting enthusiasts, or anyone who loves DIY projects. With 100 pieces to choose from, your next creative adventure is bound to be filled with endless possibilities. Perfect for crafting parties, classrooms, or as a fun family activity, these wooden shapes will inspire hours of imaginative fun.
